title: SmokeTestExecutorReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``smoke-test-executor`` (WS5 #2).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see envelope.json). The composite itself returns ``ok: true`` at the outer envelope even when the probed executor fails — a failing executor is a normal, expected outcome the skill branches on, not a CLI error. The signal is ``exit_code``: ``0`` = clean import + compute(); non-zero = fix-then-retry; ``null`` = the probe timed out (``timed_out: true``).

exit_code.title: Exit Code
exit_code.description: Return code of the child probe. ``0`` = the module imported and compute() ran clean. Non-zero = fix-then-retry (the traceback's final frames are in ``stderr_tail``). ``null`` only when the probe timed out before exiting.

stdout_tail.title: Stdout Tail
stdout_tail.description: Last ~2000 characters the child wrote to stdout.

stderr_tail.title: Stderr Tail
stderr_tail.description: Last ~2000 characters the child wrote to stderr. On a non-zero exit this carries the executor's traceback tail; on a timeout it carries a ``timed out after <N>s`` marker.

timed_out.title: Timed Out
timed_out.description: True iff the probe exceeded ``timeout_sec`` and was killed. When true, ``exit_code`` is ``null``.
